rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount has no relation to Educ. Code §25.091, which governs peace officer and attendance officer duties for compulsory school attendance enforcement.
quote: A peace officer serving as an attendance officer has the following powers and duties concerning enforcement of compulsory school attendance requirements
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption increase and compulsory school attendance enforcement provisions.
